config.binaryDetectionRules: Rules for binary file detection: nullByteCheck (check for null bytes), controlCharRatio (maximum ratio of control characters), controlCharCheck (enable control character checking).
config.detectSensitiveData: Enable detection of sensitive data like API keys, tokens, and passwords. When detected, you'll be prompted to mask the sensitive information.
config.excludeDirectories: List of directory names to always exclude from copying.
config.knownBinaryExtensions: List of file extensions to always treat as binary files.
config.knownTextExtensions: List of file extensions to always treat as text files.
config.maskShowPartial: When masking sensitive data, show the first and last few characters instead of masking completely.
config.maxCharacters: Maximum number of characters allowed in a single copy operation.
config.maxFiles: Maximum number of files allowed in a single copy operation.
config.sensitiveDataPatterns: Custom patterns for detecting sensitive data. Each pattern should have a name, regex pattern, and confidence level.
config.useGitignore: Consider `.gitignore` settings and exclude matching files from clipboard copy.
extension.description: Copy files, folders, and editor tabs to the clipboard as markdown for AI-assisted development workflows.
